name: cail-deploy
description: CAIL Deploy assistant adapter for building CAIL-compatible Cloudflare apps.

interface.shortDescription: Build and deploy apps that fit the CAIL runtime.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that teaches the CAIL Deploy runtime, bundles the remote CAIL MCP server, and provides a cail-init command prompt for scaffolding and shipping new projects.
defaultPrompt: Use CAIL Deploy to build me a small web app.
Scaffold and deploy a CAIL-compatible survey tool.
Make this Worker fit CAIL Deploy and push it live.
